title: Overcoming the Intrinsic Performance Limitations of MEMS IMU via Diffusion-Based Generative Learning
abstract: 惯性测量单元（IMU）是多源组合导航系统中的基础传感元件，其性能直接决定了导航解算的精度与可靠性。然而，低成本IMU的精度受其硬件限制存在固有局限。近年来，生成式人工智能在复杂数据分布建模与高保真信号重构方面展现出卓越能力。受此启发，本文提出一种基于扩散模型的生成式学习框架，可从低成本IMU测量数据中合成高保真虚拟IMU数据。具体而言，我们构建了基于U-Net架构的条件扩散模型，将高等级IMU测量值作为真实先验，低成本IMU测量值作为条件输入。该模型生成的虚拟IMU数据被应用于后续导航定位任务中。实验结果表明，在定位和姿态估计方面，所生成的虚拟IMU数据显著优于原始低成本IMU测量值。进一步地，我们将该模型迁移至机载测图实验，应用本方法可生成更薄、一致性更高的点云。总体而言，本框架突破了低成本IMU的性能极限，证明了基于扩散模型的生成式学习在虚拟高等级IMU数据领域的发展潜力。
preview_text: Inertial measurement units (IMUs) are fundamental sensing components in multi-source integrated navigation systems, and their performance directly determines the accuracy and reliability of solutions. However, the precision of low-cost IMUs is inherently constrained by hardware limitations. Recently, generative artificial intelligence has demonstrated remarkable capability in modeling complex data distributions and reconstructing high-fidelity signals. Motivated by this, we propose a diffusion-based generative learning framework for synthesizing high-fidelity virtual IMU data from low-cost IMU measurements. Specifically, a conditional diffusion model based on a U-Net architecture is constructed, where high-grade IMU measurements are utilized as ground-truth priors and low-cost IMU measurements are employed as conditional inputs. The virtual IMU data generated by the model is used for subsequent navigation and localization tasks. Experimental results demonstrate that the generated virtual IMU data significantly outperform the original low-cost IMU measurements in both positioning and attitude estimation. Furthermore, we transfer the model to airborne mapping experiments, where the proposed method produces thinner and more consistent point clouds. Overall, the proposed framework breaks the performance limits of low-cost IMU and demonstrates the potential of diffusion-based generative learning for virtual high-grade IMU data.
one_line_summary: 该论文提出基于扩散生成学习的方法提升低成本IMU性能，与强化学习、VLA、机器人控制等关键词无关。
